issues.description: Second effect has trigger 'Trigger' with no associated condition. A 'Trigger' effect requires a specific trigger condition (e.g., 'OnAttack', 'OnKO', etc.) or a Conditions array. This effect is incomplete and cannot execute.
Second effect draws a card, but the card text only describes K.O. effect. No draw effect is mentioned in the official text. This action should not exist.
